nasb.text: Behold, to the Lord your God belong heaven and the highest heavens, the earth and all that is in it.

esv.text: Behold, to the Lord your God belong heaven and the heaven of heavens, the earth with all that is in it.

cnv.text: 看哪，天和天上的天，地和地上的一切都是屬於耶和華你的　神的。

ccb.text: 看啊，诸天、大地和万物都属于你们的上帝耶和华。
